hooks.command: INPUT=$(cat); CMD=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.tool_input.command // ""'); case "$CMD" in *git\ commit*|*git\ push*) CHANGED=$(git diff --cached --name-only 2>/dev/null || git diff --name-only HEAD 2>/dev/null); if echo "$CHANGED" | grep -qE 'src/(commands/|args\.ts|bin\.ts|format\.ts)'; then echo 'REMINDER: CLI surface changed — review src/commands/llm.ts and run: bun test src/__tests__/llm.test.ts' >&2; fi; exit 0 ;; *) exit 0 ;; esac
